posts.author: Akash_Shah
posts.text: NPS - changes in withdrawal rules — Yeah this came in some time back. However on withdrawal, only 60% of corpus is tax free, so that additional 20% withdrawal would be taxable. Still good changes.

posts.author: neha1101
posts.text: NPS - changes in withdrawal rules — The compulsory annuity allocation reduced to 20%, enabling investors to withdraw up to 80% They may opt for a lump sum payout or choose staggered withdrawals. Subscribers holding an NPS corpus of Rs 8 lakh or less can now exit the scheme with a full lump sum payout, without any obligation to invest in annuity products. This marks a significant increase from the earlier cap of Rs 2.5 lakh. An exit can now be initiated when any one of the following milestones is reached: 15 years in the scheme, age 60, or retirement, whichever comes first. the age cap for rema…
